I'll search for this reference to verify whether it exists.
Based on my web search, I found the paper with the exact title cited in the reference.

EXPLANATION: The exact paper "Efficient Inference Scaling for Safety Assurance" by Ruizhong Qiu, Gaotang Li, Ting-Wei Li, Tianxin Wei, Jingrui He, and Hanghang Tong was confirmed to be published at the NeurIPS 2025 Workshop on Vision–Language Model Real-World Deployment, as documented on Gaotang Li's personal website.

LINK: https://gaotangli.github.io/

FOUND_TITLE: Efficient Inference Scaling for Safety Assurance
FOUND_AUTHORS: Ruizhong Qiu, Gaotang Li, Ting-Wei Li, Tianxin Wei, Jingrui He, Hanghang Tong
